journalName: RESEARCH ON LANGUAGE AND SOCIAL INTERACTION
raw_title: Unwrapping the gift of life: Newborn gender announcements as an interactional achievement
title_en: Unwrapping the gift of life: Newborn gender announcements as an interactional achievement
title_zh: 揭开生命礼物：新生儿性别宣布作为一种互动成就
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨人们如何通过互动方式宣布新生儿的性别，将其视为一种社会成就。它关注宣布过程中的沟通行为和社会意义。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how people announce the gender of newborns through interaction, treating it as a social achievement. It focuses on the communication behaviors and social meanings in the announcement process.
research_direction_zh: 传播研究中的社会互动分析，特别是日常生活中的仪式性沟通事件。
research_direction_en: Social interaction analysis in communication studies, particularly ritualistic communication events in everyday life.
